web.title: Lyra — Private device network
web.text:
Lyra

2 online · private network

Devices
Clipboard
Transfers
Settings

This device

My Computer

Dark mode
Settings

Device identity, defaults, and paired device management.

This device
Name and cryptographic fingerprint stay on this machine.
Device name
Save

Fingerprint

E6EB · 6EAA · 8F06 · 41C4

Platform web · ID 516c1a1adf33952d

Defaults
Applied to newly paired devices and global behavior.

Clipboard sync

Automatically share copies with paired devices when enabled.

Auto-monitor system clipboard

While Lyra is open and focused, detect new copies on this desktop and capture them (browser may ask for clipboard permission).

Auto-accept transfers

Receive files from paired devices without a prompt.

Auto-accept clipboard

Write incoming clipboard items to the system clipboard.

Network discovery

Announce and look for devices on the local network.

Tailscale support

Also probe known peers over Tailscale / MagicDNS.

Verify transfer integrity

Check SHA-256 after transfers complete when checksums are available.

Clipboard history limit

Number of recent items to keep locally.

Peer listen port

HTTP port used by the desktop peer server (default 53317).

Network
Local peer server, discovery, and Tailscale probing.
Peer server idle
Discovery off
Browser

Listen endpoint

Browser mode — run desktop shell or peer-server on :53317

Refresh discovery
Probe Tailscale peers

Real sockets run in the Electron desktop shell or pnpm peer-server. The browser UI probes known hosts via HTTP /lyra/info.

Keyboard shortcuts
In-app power-user bindings (Ctrl on Windows/Linux, ⌘ on macOS).
Focus device search
Mod+K
Open settings
Mod+,
Open first online device explorer
Mod+E
Send system clipboard to online devices
Mod+Shift+V
Open clipboard history
Mod+Shift+C
Open transfers
Mod+Shift+T
Pause / resume active transfers
Mod+Shift+P
Paired devices
3 devices in your trusted network.

native.title: Lyra
native.text:
Pair device
Scan a QR on desktop, show your QR, or enter a pairing code. Both sides confirm trust.
Your QR & code
------
Tap to generate
E6CA · AC20 · 4A11 · 07D6
Scan QR with camera
Point your camera at the desktop pairing QR. Both devices stay paired until you unpair.
Camera scan (native only)
Expo web cannot use the device camera for QR pairing. Use the paste field below, or run on a phone/simulator with a camera.
Enter code
Pair
Paste QR payload
Fallback when the camera is unavailable — paste the JSON encoded in the desktop QR.
Apply pasted QR
Simulate incoming request
